recommendations.title: Ben 10: Alien Swarm
recommendations.overview: Ben and a mysterious girl from his past must prevent an alien threat from destroying the world.

recommendations.title: Freaked
recommendations.overview: A vain actor, his best friend, and an activist end up at a mutant freak farm run by a weirdo scientist.

recommendations.title: Smosh: The Movie
recommendations.overview: An embarrassing video of Anthony surfaces online right before his fifth high school reunion. The Smosh dudes then race to pull down the clip before it blows Anthony's chances of reconnecting with his teen crush Anna.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb become the galaxy's unlikeliest last hope when they must return the Death Star plans to the Rebel Alliance.

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Wizard School
recommendations.overview: When Alex is caught using magic to clean her room she is forced to go to wizard school with Justin. Max and Jerry camp out on the terrace to prove their manhood.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Destroy All Aliens
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the original animated series Ben 10.  Ben becomes targeted by an evil Mechamorph Warrior, named "Retaliator," who mistakenly blames Ben for something he did not do and attempts to destroy all aliens.
